posts.title: How adaptive disclosure rescues a weak browser agent — and taxes a strong one
posts.summary: Progressive disclosure is sold as a token saver. On a weak model, adaptively sizing what the agent sees cuts tokens to a third and solves more hard tasks; on a strong model the same policy is the most expensive arm. When it helps, and when it doesn't.

posts.title: Welcome to Research Blog
posts.summary: Starting a research blog to document experiments, paper reimplementations, and engineering insights.
